text: A driver may request an administrative hearing to review a revocation under s. 322.221 (3). The hearing must be held in accordance with the department’s administrative rules adopted under chapter 120.
markdown:
### Chapter 322. Driver Licenses
##### § 322.222 — Right to review

A driver may request an administrative hearing to review a revocation under s. 322.221 (3). The hearing must be held in accordance with the department’s administrative rules adopted under chapter 120.
